name: NRHIS Sprint 2 Build052 Incremental USGS Update and Data Quality Gate
features: resume USGS historical retrieval from the newest stored observation with a configurable overlap
run duplicate-safe incremental updates through the selected end date
detect missing and stale configured station-parameter combinations
detect observation gaps above a configurable duration
write basin data-quality JSON and CSV products
write a machine-readable incremental update receipt for reporting gates
preserves: production current-condition USGS harvest from Build050
restart-safe historical USGS backfill from Build051
workflow contract preflight and CI parity gates
verified installer archival and next-build chaining
